verdict_reasoning: TGFB1 is a secreted cytokine with no transmembrane domain of its own. It is synthesized as a prodomain-growth factor complex, secreted via unconventional pathways, and sequestered in the extracellular matrix bound to LTBP. While latent TGFB1 transiently reaches the plasma membrane during secretion, the mature protein is released into the extracellular space and ECM, not stably displayed on the cell surface. The protein has no intrinsic membrane anchor and is not surface-accessible from the outer leaflet.
